# services.nix-serve

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.nix-serve`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.nix-serve.bindAddress` | `string` | IP address where nix-serve will bind its listening socket. |
| `services.nix-serve.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable nix-serve, the standalone Nix binary cache server. |
| `services.nix-serve.extraParams` | `strings concatenated with " "` | Extra command line parameters for nix-serve. |
| `services.nix-serve.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for nix-serve. |
| `services.nix-serve.package` | `package` | The nix-serve package to use. |
| `services.nix-serve.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port number where nix-serve will listen on. |
| `services.nix-serve.secretKeyFile` | `null or string` | The path to the file used for signing derivation data. Generate with: `nix-store --generate-binary-cache-key key-name secret-key-file public-key-file` For more details see {manpage}`nix-store(1)`. |
